Simbad Regime

Faction / Organisation · First seen 3304-01-19 · 2 mentions
Active: 3304-01-19 → 3304-01-26

L
Parmitano Terminal
Mentions Timeline (2 articles)
3304-01-26
Simbad Regime Campaign Concludes
The Simbad Regime has announced that its appeal for construction materials was enthusiastically received, resulting in a massive influx of deliveries to Parmitano Terminal. The new asteroid base among the rings of Nu Tauri 5 is now under construction.
3304-01-19
Simbad Regime Campaign
The Simbad Regime, established over a year ago with support from Commanders across the galaxy, has announced plans to construct a new asteroid base among the rings of Nu Tauri 5. The group has placed an open order for explosives, beryllium, aluminium, and tea.
